scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');const p='../scripts/sync-frontend-env.mjs';if(fs.existsSync(p)){const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[p],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1);}else{console.log('Skipping env sync: '+p+' not found.');}"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');const p='../scripts/sync-frontend-env.mjs';if(fs.existsSync(p)){const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[p],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status??1);}else{console.log('Skipping env sync: '+p+' not found.');}"
